queries.item: CREATE TABLE `?:labels` ( `label_id` mediumint(8) unsigned NOT NULL auto_increment, `label_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL default '', `label_desc` varchar(255) NOT NULL default '', `label_length` int(11) NOT NULL default '0', `label_width` int(11) NOT NULL default '0', `label_material_id` mediumint(8) NOT NULL default '0', `label_form_id` mediumint(8) NOT NULL default '0', PRIMARY KEY (`label_id`), UNIQUE KEY `uniq_label_name` (`label_name`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
